evals.name: magic-link-despike
evals.prompt: I spiked passwordless login in Django and it works, but the code is messy. How do I de-spike it with tests?
evals.expected_output: Captures spike learning, writes functional/integration behavior, reverts or quarantines spike code, rebuilds in slices, and fakes only email delivery.

evals.name: prototype-to-production
evals.prompt: This Django branch has a quick prototype for invitations. I want to keep the learning but not the implementation.
evals.expected_output: Separates learned facts from code, defines behavior tests, rebuilds working-state-to-working-state, and includes cleanup/verification.
